tags.name: Expiry Auctions: Registrar Partners
tags.description: API for auction-related actions exclusive to whitelisted partners.

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Only include results for the specified domains. Use comma-separated string to include more than one domain. For example, `one.com,two.info,three.biz`

parameters.name: listingStatus
parameters.description: Only include results for the specified listing status.

parameters.name: transferBefore
parameters.description: Domain transfer time before this time, ISO 8601, in UTC. Defaults to last day of the previous month if not provided. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` listingStatus.

parameters.name: transferAfter
parameters.description: Domain transfer time after this time, ISO 8601, in UTC. Defaults to first day of the previous month if not provided. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` listingStatus.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

401.description: Authentication info not sent or invalid

403.description: Authenticated user is not allowed access

422.description: Required parameters must be specified in correct format

429.description: Too many requests received within interval

parameters.description: A comma separated list of domain names
parameters.name: domains

401.description: Authentication info not sent or invalid

403.description: Authenticated user is not allowed access

422.description: Required parameters must be specified in correct format

429.description: Too many requests received within interval

parameters.description: An array of expiry listings to be loaded
parameters.name: expiryListings

401.description: Authentication info not sent or invalid

403.description: Authenticated user is not allowed access

422.description:
Required parameters must be specified in correct format
Too many Listings provided
Invalid Losing Registrar Id

429.description: Too many requests received within interval

post.summary: Add expiry listings into GoDaddy Auction

domainName.description: The domain name for the listing.

domainCreatedAt.description: Date when the domain was first registered in ISO-8601 format

domainExpiresAt.description: Date when the domain expires in ISO-8601 format

domainRegistrarIanaId.description: Source registrar IANA id for the domain name. Reference - https://www.iana.org/assignments/registrar-ids/registrar-ids.xhtml

pageViewsMonthly.description: Monthly traffic page view for the domain

revenueMonthly.description: Monthly parking revenue (in USD micro unit) for the domain

auctionStartAt.description: The UTC date and time, in RFC 3339 format, that the auction starts.

auctionEndAt.description: The UTC date and time, in RFC 3339 format, that the auction ends.

auctionTransferAt.description: The UTC date and time, in RFC 3339 format, that the auction domain is transferred. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` status.

auctionSoldAt.description: The UTC date and time, in RFC 3339 format, that the auction domain is sold. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` status.

auctionBookingAmountUsd.description: The booking amount (in USD micro units) for the auction domain. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` status.

losingRegistrarId.description: Losing registrar id for the domain

pageViewsMonthly.description: Monthly traffic page view for the domain

revenueMonthly.description: Monthly parking revenue (in USD micro unit) for the domain

first.description: URI to access the first page

previous.description: URI to access the previous page

next.description: URI to access the next page

last.description: URI to access the last page

code.description: Short identifier for the error, suitable for indicating the specific error within client code

fields.description: List of the specific fields, and the errors found with their contents

message.description: Human-readable, English description of the error

code.description: Short identifier for the error, suitable for indicating the specific error within client code

message.description: Human-readable, English description of the problem with the contents of the field

path.description:
• JSONPath referring to a field containing an error
    • OR
  • JSONPath referring to a field that refers to an object containing an error, with more detail in `pathRelated`

pathRelated.description: JSONPath referring to a field containing an error, which is referenced by `path`

code.description: Short identifier for the error, suitable for indicating the specific error within client code

fields.description: List of the specific fields, and the errors found with their contents

message.description: Human-readable, English description of the error

retryAfterSec.description: Number of seconds to wait before attempting a similar request
